title: Staff: Keyshawn Moncrieffe
display_label: Keyshawn Moncrieffe, PhD — Acting Director for Research Compliance
staff_title: Acting Director for Research Compliance, Research & Economic Development
content:
Dr. Keyshawn Moncrieffe, PhD is the Acting Director for Research Compliance, Research & Economic Development.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-1313. Email: keyshawn.moncrieffe@morgan.edu.

Dr. Keyshawn Moncrieffe serves as Acting Director for Research Compliance at Morgan State University. She provides oversight of programs that promote ethical and compliant research — including human research protections (IRB), responsible conduct of research (RCR), financial conflict of interest, export controls, and research security.

She plays a key role in developing the University's inaugural Research Security Program under the NSF-funded Research Integrity, Security, and Compliance (RISC) initiative, in partnership with several Mid-Atlantic Minority Serving Institutions (MSIs).

Dr. Moncrieffe brings extensive experience in research administration, compliance program operations, and project management, advancing Morgan State's mission to foster a culture of research integrity and excellence.

Education: PhD in Higher Education (Advanced Studies Leadership & Policy), Morgan State University; MBA, Morgan State University; MHS, University of Maryland, Baltimore (pending).

Certifications: Certified Research Administrator (CRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Compliance & Ethics Professional (CCEP) (Society of Corporate Compliance & Ethics.

Certificates: Contract Administration (Villanova University); Research Administration (University of Maryland, Baltimore); Global Research Ethics (University of Maryland, Baltimore).
